title: Hiranandani Group Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Hiranandani Group Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
We at Hiranandani Group Ventures Solutions are looking for an experienced Senior Property Advisor based out of Navi Mumbai. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Hiranandani Group Ventures Solutions:
Hiranandani Group Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hiranandani Group Ventures Solutions!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
